Getting Started

This section provides comprehensive guidance for setting up and running WTicket in your environment.

Getting Started

  • Installation Guide
    • Step 1: Clone the Repository
    • Step 2: Create JSONBin.io Bins
    • Step 3: Configure the Application
    • Step 4: Local Development Server
    • Step 5: Verify Installation
    • Troubleshooting
  • Configuration Guide
    • Application Constants
    • JSONBin.io Configuration
    • JSONBin Free Tier Limits
    • Environment Variables
    • Theme Configuration
    • Session Configuration
    • Security Recommendations
    • Customization Options

    • GitHub Pages (Recommended)

Prerequisites

Before beginning the installation process, ensure you have the following:

  • Web Browser: Chrome 90+, Firefox 88+, Safari 14+, or Edge 90+

  • JSONBin.io Account: Free tier subscription

  • Git: Version 2.x or higher

  • Network Access: HTTPS connectivity required

Estimated Setup Time

  • Beginner: 15-20 minutes

  • Experienced: 5-10 minutes

Next Steps

  1. Follow the Installation Guide guide to set up your environment

  2. Configure your JSONBin.io credentials in Configuration Guide

  3. Deploy to your preferred platform via Deployment Guide
